info.description:
We uses HMAC signature for the authentication. Below are the required headers to be passed for the Authentication process during the request.

Request Headers:
Authorization	hmac username="CLIENT_ID", algorithm="hmac-sha256", headers="date request-line", signature="SIGNATURE"
Date	Wed, 28 Oct 2020 06:23:23 GMT

You must generate signature from this: 
https://developers.mekari.com/dashboard/hmac-validator

Or you can simply fill in the Client ID and Client Secret below, 
by generating a new one or using your previous credentials which you can get from here https://developers.mekari.com/dashboard/applications

<input type="text" id="client_id" placeholder="Client Id">
<input type="text" id="client_secret" placeholder="Client Secret">

Base URL MAG: api.mekari.com

post.description:
Discount Type and Witholding Type

`discount_type_name` and `witholding_type` are divided into two types : 1. Percent `discount_type_name` and `discount_value` example : * `discount_type_name`: `Percent` * `discount_value`: 10 * The discount will be 10% `witholding_type` and `witholding_value` example : * `witholding_type` : `Percent` * `witholding_value` : 10 * The witholding will be 10% 2. Value `discount_type_name` and `discount_value` example : * `discount_type_name` : `Value` * `discount_type_value` : 10 * The discount will be 10 `witholding_type` and `witholding_value` example : * `witholding_type` : `Value` * `witholding_value` : 10 * The witholding will be 10 `discount_type_name` and `witholding_type` can only be filled with `Percent` or `Value`. If its not match it will return error message.
To create a Sales Invoice from Sales Order, you have to add "selected_po_id": sales_order_id, to your parameter. To create a Sales Invoice from Sales Quote, you have to add "selected_pq_id": sales_quote_id, to your parameter. Here are the list of values that cannot be changed (will be defaulted to the sales order's value) person_id, tax_amount, tax_after_discount, discount_type_name, discount_unit, tax_id Transaction lines attributes values can be changed (optional), however note that the value (quantity) cannot be less than the value in the sales order. For all transaction related modules, add "included_attachment_ids": [attachment_id] that will be included into the transaction, apart from those will be deleted. `transaction_lines_attributes` is used to add products on the current transaction, `transaction_lines_attributes` has to be sent. `transaction_lines_attributes` consist of `id`, `product_id`, `product_name`, `product_code`, `description`, `quantity`, `rate`, `amount`, `discount`, `tax`, `line_tax_id`, `line_tax_name`, `custom_id` `transaction_lines_attributes` validation: 1. When creating new transaction, `id` must not be sent 2. Product can be added to the `transaction_lines_attribute` using `product_id`, `product_custom_id`, `product_name` or `product_code`, at least one of them has to be sent. 2.1. If both `product_id` and `product_custom_id` is sent, it has to be match 2.2. If `product_id` or `product_custom_id` is sent (only one of them), product will be searched based on `product_id` or `product_custom_id`. When `product` already found, `product_name` and `product_code` will be ignored. 2.3. If only `product_code` or `product_name` is sent it has to match. 3. `description` is optional, when it's not sent, `description` will be filled using selected product description. 4. `quantity`, `rate`, `amount`, `discount`, `tax`, `line_tax_id`, `line_tax_name` is optional.

line_tax_name.description: (Optional) - Can be replaced with key line_tax_id

tags.description: (Optional -> Pro & Enterprise Only) - Array of string

custom_id.description: Optional - Another option if you would like to search, patch, and also delete a transaction without  use transaction id itself.

Value Description

post.description:
Validation

Product

- `product_id` or `product_name` sent must be existing product in current company - `product_id` or `product_name` has to be sent - product can be selected using `product_id` or `product_name`, if both are sent, it must match

Unit

- `unit_id` or `unit_name` sent must be existing product unit in current company - `unit` can be selected using `unit_id` or `unit_name`, if both are sent, it must match - Selected unit must be different from selected product base unit - Each unit used in each product must be different - Existing unit conversion : - `product_id` = 1 - `unit_id` = 1 - `rate` = 2 - DO - `product_id` = 1 - `unit_id` = 2 - `rate` = 2 - DONT - `product_id` = 1 - `unit_id` = 1 - `rate` = 2

Rate

- `rate` must be sent and has to be a non zero positive number

Buy Price Per Unit & Sell Price Per Unit

- `buy_price_per_unit` and `sell_price_per_unit` must be decimal. If not sent, the default value will be zero

Request Body Example

- product_id : 1 - product_name : Apple - unit_id : 1 - unit_name : Box - rate : 20 - buy_price_per_unit : 10000 - sell_price_per_unit : 20000 1 Box Of Apple = 20 Pcs Apple (Pcs is taken from current product base unit) Buy price for 1 Box of Apple = 10000 Sell price for 1 Box of Apple = 20000

Value Description

- product_id : product id in current unit conversion - product_name : product name in current unit conversion - unit_id : converted unit id - unit_name : converted unit name - rate : rate value of current unit conversion - buy_price_per_unit : buy price per unit for current unit conversion - sell_price_per_unit : sell price per unit for current unit conversion

product_name.description: optional if product id is sent

rate.description: has to be more than zero

Note: When the transaction is created before 05 Nov 2019, you may need to call Jurnal support to help you for reindexing your company transactions.

patch.description:
Witholding Type

`witholding_type` are divided into two types : 1. Percent `witholding_type` and `witholding_value` example : * `witholding_type` : `Percent` * `witholding_value` : 10 * The witholding will be 10% 2. Value `witholding_type` and `witholding_value` example : * `witholding_type` : `Value` * `witholding_value` : 10 * The witholding will be 10 `witholding_type` can only be filled with `percent` or `value`. If its not match it will return error message.

payment_method_id and payment_method_name validation

1. If `payment_method_id` and `payment_method_name` is sent, it has to match 2. If `payment_method_id` is sent `payment_method_name` is not sent, the `payment_method_id` must be available 3. If `payment_method_name` is sent `payment_method_id` is not sent, if the `payment_method_name` is not available it will be created 4. If `payment_method_id` and `payment_method_name` is not sent return error

expense_payable validation

1. `expense_payable` = true means that the user wants to pay later. If `expense_payable` is true then `term_id` or `term_name` has to be sent. 2. `expense_payable` = true means that the user wants to pay now. If `expense_payable` is false then `term_id` or `term_name` didn't need to be sent (if sent will be ignored)

Note - New Update (20 Nov 2017)

    There are new options where user can find any products based on created_at and updated_at. So, if you would like to find product based on created_at, you need to define 2 query parameters :

  • created_start_date
  • created_end_date
         And if you would like to find products based on updated_at, you also need to define 2 query parameters :
  • updated_start_date
  • updated_end_date

  Remember, allowed format for those parameters (created_start_date, created_end_date, updated_start_date, updated_end_date) must equal to "dd/mm/yyyy" / "12/12/2017" or "dd-mm-yyyy" / "12-12-2017"           Example how to request :

  • created_at
    /api/v1/products?created_start_date=01/01/2017&created_end_date=01/12/2017
  • updated_at
    /api/v1/products?updated_start_date=01/01/2017&updated_end_date=01/12/2017

- product_code : sort by product code - name : sort by product name - quantity_inventory : sort by total_quantity per unit - last_avg_price : sort by product latest average price - last_buy_price : sort by product last_buy_price - buy_price_per_unit : sort by product buy_price_per_unit - sell_price_per_unit : sort by product sell_price_per_unit - product_categories_name : sort by product product_categories_name

post.description:
Track Inventory

Track inventory is enabled or disabled using `track_inventory` attribute. 1. `track_inventory` : `true`, to enable track inventory 2. `track_inventory` : `false`, to disable track inventory When track inventory is sent, `inventory_asset_account` must be sent.

Inventory Asset Account

Inventory asset account can be selected using `inventory_asset_account_id` or `inventory_asset_account_name` or `inventory_asset_account_number`. When more than one attribute is sent, is must match. Account that can be used as inventory asset account is an `active non archived` account with account category `inventory`.

Product Bundle

Product bundle is a product that consist of another product. To change a single product to a bundle product when creating a new product, add `product_bundle_attributes` in the request body.

Product Bundle Attributes

* Product bundle attributes is an array consist of objects. Each object represents each product that will be included in the bundle product. * Each product bundle attributes consist of two elements:
1. Product
* Product can be selected using `product_id`, `product_name` or `product_code`. * One of these attributes must be sent to specify which product will be included in each bundle attributes. * When more than one attributes is sent, it must match each other. * Product that can be selected as one of `product_bundle_attributes` must be a `tracked product`.
2. Quantity
* Quantity must be sent for each product. * Each product bundle attributes's quantity minimum value is 1.

Bundle Cost

When a bundle product's track_inventory is `true` bundle cost can be added using `bundle_costs_attributes`.

Bundle Costs Attributes

* Bundle costs attributes is an array consist of object. Each object represents each account that will be included in the product's bundle cost * Each bundle cost attributes consist of two elements:
1. Account
* Account can be selected using `account_id`, `account_name` or `account_code`. * One of these attributes must be sent to specify which account will be used in the current bundle cost. * When more than one attributes is sent, it must match each other. * Account that can be selected as bundle cost account is an `active non archived` account with account category `Cost of Goods Sold`, `Expenses` or `Other Expenses`
2. Amount
* Amount must be sent for each bundle cost. * Each bundle cost attribute's amount minimum value is 1

post.description:
Witholding Type

`witholding_type` are divided into two types : 1. Percent `witholding_type` and `witholding_value` example : * `witholding_type` : `Percent` * `witholding_value` : 10 * The witholding will be 10% 2. Value `witholding_type` and `witholding_value` example : * `witholding_type` : `Value` * `witholding_value` : 10 * The witholding will be 10 `witholding_type` can only be filled with `percent` or `value`. If its not match it will return error message.

payment_method_id and payment_method_name validation

1. If `payment_method_id` and `payment_method_name` is sent, it has to match 2. If `payment_method_id` is sent `payment_method_name` is not sent, the `payment_method_id` must be available 3. If `payment_method_name` is sent `payment_method_id` is not sent, if the `payment_method_name` is not available it will be created 4. If `payment_method_id` and `payment_method_name` is not sent return error

expense_payable validation

1. `expense_payable` = true means that the user wants to pay later. If `expense_payable` is true then `term_id` or `term_name` has to be sent. 2. `expense_payable` = true means that the user wants to pay now. If `expense_payable` is false then `term_id` or `term_name` didn't need to be sent (if sent will be ignored)

get.summary: Get Unit Conversion by Product Id
get.description:
Use this endpoint to get all unit conversions related to inputted product id

Example

- id : 1 - product_id : 1 - product_name : Apple - product_base_unit : Pcs - unit_id : 1 - unit_name : Box - rate : 20 - buy_price_per_unit : 10000 - buy_price_per_unit_currency_format : Rp. 10.000,00 - sell_price_per_unit : 20000 - sell_price_per_unit_currency_format : Rp. 20.000,00 1 Box Of Apple = 20 Pcs Apple Buy price for 1 Box of Apple = 10000 Sell price for 1 Box of Apple = 20000

Value Description

- id : unit conversion id - product_id : product id in current unit conversion - product_name : product name in current unit conversion - product_base_unit : base unit used in current unit conversion - unit_id : converted unit id - unit_name : converted unit name - rate : rate value of current unit conversion - buy_price_per_unit : buy price per unit for current unit conversion - buy_price_per_unit_currency_format : buy price per unit in currency format - sell_price_per_unit : sell price per unit for current unit conversion - sell_price_per_unit_currency_format : sell price per unit in currency format

get.summary: Get Credit Memo by Person Type
get.description:
Returns all credit memos in the current company by person type id
person_type is customer / vendor

type
cash : untuk category cash and bank (dipakai di deposit atau refund account) account : akun biasa, nanti didefinenya di param priority expense: dipakai di expense
priority
ditentukan berdasarkan typenya: type cash:
  • cash-bank : hanya akun cash & bank yang aktif
  • cash-all : semua akun cash & bank
  • Priority must be `cash-bank` or `cash-all`.
type account
  • all : semua akun aktif dan bukan akun header
  • bank: semua akun kategory Bank
  • ol : semua akun kategori Other Reliability
  • gc: semua akun kategory Gift Card
  • inv: semua akun kategory Inventory
  • Priority must be one of `all`, `bank`, `ol`, `oa`, `gc`, `inv`, `liabilities`, `assets`, `not_mc`, `account_by_activity`.
type expense:
  • cogs-expense : akun expense kategory cost of good sold
  • cogs-product : semua akun kategori Cost of Good Sold
  • sales : semua akun kategori Sale, Income, Other Income, Cash & Bank yang aktif
  • inventory : semua akun expense kategori Inventory yang aktif
  • all : semua akun kategori expense yang aktif
  • Priority must be one of `cogs-expense`, `cogs-product`, `sales`, `product-sell`, `product-buy`, `inventory`, `all`.
type ap_and_ar:
  • ap : akun kategory account payable
  • ar : akun kategori account_receivable
  • all : akun payable dan receivabale
  • Priority must be `ap`, `ar`, or `all`.
type asset:
  • fixed : akun fixed asset
  • credited : credited asset account
  • depreciate : depreciation asset account
  • accumulated : semua akun accumulated asset account
  • Priority must be `fixed`, `depreciate`, `credited`, or `accumulated`.
type sales_discount: untuk sales discount accounts. Priority must be `all`. type stock_adjustment : untuk account tipe stock adjustment
exclude
masukkan id yang akan di exclude dari result. Contoh: "1,2" maka result dengan id 1 dan 2 akan di exclude

The priority to filter by, varies based on the type. Validation rules are applied according to the type.
See the detailed description above for valid priorities for each type.

- id : unit conversion id - product_id : product id in current unit conversion - product_name : product name in current unit conversion - product_base_unit_id : base unit id used in current unit conversion - product_base_unit_name : base unit name used in current unit conversion - unit_id : converted unit id - unit_name : converted unit name - rate : rate value of current unit conversion - buy_price_per_unit : buy price per unit for current unit conversion - buy_price_per_unit_currency_format : buy price per unit in currency format - sell_price_per_unit : sell price per unit for current unit conversion - sell_price_per_unit_currency_format : sell price per unit in currency format

patch.description:
Validation

General

- All parameters are optional, if not sent the value used will be existing value in selected unit conversion

Product

- `product_id` and `product_name` cannot be changed - If `product_id` or `product_name` is sent, it must be the same as the product in selected unit conversion

Unit

- `unit_id` or `unit_name` sent must be existing product unit in current company - `unit` can be selected using `unit_id` or `unit_name`, if both are sent, it must match - Selected unit must be different from selected product base unit - Each unit used in each product must be different - Existing unit conversion : - `product_id` = 1 - `unit_id` = 1 - `rate` = 2 - DO - `product_id` = 1 - `unit_id` = 2 - `rate` = 2 - DONT - `product_id` = 1 - `unit_id` = 1 - `rate` = 2

Rate

- `rate` has to be a non zero positive number

Buy Price Per Unit & Sell Price Per Unit

- `buy_price_per_unit` and `sell_price_per_unit` must be decimal.

Request Body Example

Existing unit conversion: - unit_conversion_id : 1 - product_id : 1 - product_name : Apple - unit_id : 1 - unit_name : Box - rate : 20 - buy_price_per_unit : 10000 - sell_price_per_unit : 20000 Sent request body: - product_id : 1 - product_name : Apple - unit_id : 2 - unit_name : Dozen - rate : 12 - buy_price_per_unit : 10000 - sell_price_per_unit : 20000 1 Dozen Of Apple = 12 Pcs Apple (Pcs is taken from current product base unit) Buy price for 1 Dozen of Apple = 10000 Sell price for 1 Dozen of Apple = 20000

Value Description

- unit_id : converted unit id - unit_name : converted unit name - rate : rate value of current unit conversion - buy_price_per_unit : buy price per unit for current unit conversion - sell_price_per_unit : sell price per unit for current unit conversion

patch.description:
Track Inventory

Track inventory is enabled or disabled using `track_inventory` attribute. 1. `track_inventory` : `true`, to enable track inventory 2. `track_inventory` : `false`, to disable track inventory When track inventory is sent, `inventory_asset_account` must be sent.

Inventory Asset Account

Inventory asset account can be selected using `inventory_asset_account_id` or `inventory_asset_account_name` or `inventory_asset_account_number`. When more than one attribute is sent, is must match. Account that can be used as inventory asset account is an `active non archived` account with account category `inventory`.

Product Bundle

Product bundle is a product that consist of another product. To change a single product to a bundle product when updating a product, add `product_bundle_attributes` in the request body.

Product Bundle Attributes

* Product bundle attributes is an array consist of objects. Each object represents each product that will be included in the bundle product. * Each product bundle attributes consist of three elements:
1. Id
* Id is the identifier of each product bundle attributes. * When updating an existing product bundle id must be sent * When id of a product bundle attribute is not sent, it will add a new product bundle attributes for the current product bundle.
2. Product
* Product can be selected using `product_id`, `product_name` or `product_code`. * One of these attributes must be sent to specify which product will be included in each bundle attributes (when id of product bundle attribute is not sent). * When more than one attributes is sent, it must match each other. * Product is optional when product bundle attribute's id is sent. * Product that can be selected as one of `product_bundle_attributes` must be a `tracked product`.
3. Quantity
* Quantity must be sent for each new product bundle attributes. * Quantity can be optional only when product bundle attribute's id is sent. The quantity used will be the previous quantity used in current id. * Each product bundle attributes's quantity minimum value is 1. * Product bundle attribute can also be removed using `remove_bundle_elements`
Removing Bundle Elements
* To remove bundle cost elements simply include `remove_bundle_elements` in your request body and send the `product_bundle_attributes` id you want to remove. * `remove_bundle_elements` must be sent as an array. * Example: `remove_bundle_elements`: `[1,2,3]`

Bundle Cost

When a bundle product's track_inventory is `true` bundle cost can be added using `bundle_costs_attributes`.

Bundle Costs Attributes

* Bundle costs attributes is an array consist of object. Each object represents each account that will be included in the product's bundle cost * Each bundle cost attributes consist of three elements:
1. Id
* Id is the identifier of each bundle cost attributes. * When updating an existing bundle cost id must be sent * When id of a bundle cost attribute is not sent, it will add a new bundle cost for the current product bundle.
2. Account
* Account can be selected using `account_id`, `account_name` or `account_code`. * One of these attributes must be sent to specify which account will be used in the current bundle cost (when id of bundle costs attribute is not sent). * When more than one attributes is sent, it must match each other. * Account is optional when bundle cost attribute's id is sent. * Account that can be selected as bundle cost account is an `active non archived` account with account category `Cost of Goods Sold`, `Expenses` or `Other Expenses`
3. Amount
* Amount must be sent for each new bundle cost. * Amount can be optional only when bundle cost attribute's id is sent. The amount used will be the previous amount used in current id. * Each bundle cost attribute's amount minimum value is 1 * Bundle cost attribute can also be removed using `remove_bundle_cost_elements`
Removing Bundle Cost Elements
* To remove bundle cost elements simply include `remove_bundle_cost_elements` in your request body and send the `bundle_cost_attribute` id you want to remove. * `remove_bundle_cost_elements` must be sent as an array. * Example: `remove_bundle_cost_elements`: `[1,2,3]`

post.description:
1 batch of request can handle up to 100 expenses

Witholding Type

`witholding_type` are divided into two types : 1. Percent `witholding_type` and `witholding_value` example : * `witholding_type` : `Percent` * `witholding_value` : 10 * The witholding will be 10% 2. Value `witholding_type` and `witholding_value` example : * `witholding_type` : `Value` * `witholding_value` : 10 * The witholding will be 10 `witholding_type` can only be filled with `percent` or `value`. If its not match it will return error message.

payment_method_id and payment_method_name validation

1. If `payment_method_id` and `payment_method_name` is sent, it has to match 2. If `payment_method_id` is sent `payment_method_name` is not sent, the `payment_method_id` must be available 3. If `payment_method_name` is sent `payment_method_id` is not sent, if the `payment_method_name` is not available it will be created 4. If `payment_method_id` and `payment_method_name` is not sent return error

expense_payable validation

1. `expense_payable` = true means that the user wants to pay later. If `expense_payable` is true then `term_id` or `term_name` has to be sent. 2. `expense_payable` = true means that the user wants to pay now. If `expense_payable` is false then `term_id` or `term_name` didn't need to be sent (if sent will be ignored)
1 batch of request can handle up to 100 journal entries.

1 batch of request can handle up to 100 purchase invoices

Discount Type and Witholding Type

`discount_type_name` and `witholding_type` are divided into two types : 1. Percent `discount_type_name` and `discount_value` example : * `discount_type_name`: `Percent` * `discount_value`: 10 * The discount will be 10% `witholding_type` and `witholding_value` example : * `witholding_type` : `Percent` * `witholding_value` : 10 * The witholding will be 10% 2. Value `discount_type_name` and `discount_value` example : * `discount_type_name` : `Value` * `discount_type_value` : 10 * The discount will be 10 `witholding_type` and `witholding_value` example : * `witholding_type` : `Value` * `witholding_value` : 10 * The witholding will be 10 `discount_type_name` and `witholding_type` can only be filled with `percent` or `value`. If its not match it will return error message.
`transaction_lines_attributes` is used to add products on the current transaction, `transaction_lines_attributes` has to be sent. `transaction_lines_attributes` consist of `id`, `product_id`, `product_name`, `product_code`, `description`, `quantity`, `rate`, `amount`, `discount`, `tax`, `line_tax_id`, `line_tax_name`, `custom_id` `transaction_lines_attributes` validation: 1. When creating new transaction, `id` must not be sent 2. Product can be added to the `transaction_lines_attribute` using `product_id`, `product_custom_id`, `product_name` or `product_code`, at least one of them has to be sent. 2.1. If both `product_id` and `product_custom_id` is sent, it has to be match 2.2. If `product_id` or `product_custom_id` is sent (only one of them), product will be searched based on `product_id` or `product_custom_id`. When `product` already found, `product_name` and `product_code` will be ignored. 2.3. If only `product_code` or `product_name` is sent it has to match. 3. `description` is optional, when it's not sent, `description` will be filled using selected product description. 4. `quantity`, `rate`, `amount`, `discount`, `tax`, `line_tax_id`, `line_tax_name` is optional

## Important
After November 18th, 2021 update, there are multiple ways to get a Stock Adjustment
### 1. Get By ID
Same as before. No need to add query string to your request.


### 2. Get By Transaction Number

To do this you need to add query string `search_by` and `transaction_type` to your request.

- Set `search_by` to `transaction_no` to search by transaction number.

- Set `transaction_type` to `adjustment` if you're requesting for Stock Count (Stock Adjustment). 

- Set `transaction_type` to `movement` if you're requesting for Stock In/Out.

**Important:** query string `search_by` and `transaction_type` is a pair. If you use `search_by`, you need to provide `transaction_type` too and vice versa. Providing only one of them in the request will return an error.

- `end_date` format is `dd/mm/yyyy`

### Sales list Query Param Further Explanation

- `start_date` and `end_date` format is `dd/mm/yyyy`
- `compare_type` is used for period filter, and receive any of these values : `["custom", "day", "yesterday", "last_week", "last_month", "last_year"]` - ("day" is used for today)
- `report_layout_id` for sales invoice report is 1, and for sales invoice detail report is 2. It also support id from sales list custom template you created
- `transaction_type_id` is used for filter by transaction type, and receive these values : 


| Transaction type      | values                |
|-----------------------|-----------------------|
| Sales Invoice         | 1                     |
| Receive Payment       | 2                     |
| Sales Order           | 3                     |
| Sales Order Payment   | 11                    |
| Sales Return          | 12                    |
| Sales Quote           | 20                    |
| Sales Invoice Payment | SALES_INVOICE_PAYMENT |


- `tag_logic` is used in more filter -> group by tag -> include all or either . `all` stands for "include all" and `or` is used for "either"
- `tag_ids`, `person_id` and `status_id` is support for more than one option selected, separated by comma, example :   - `?person_id=12334,435353,66787`
- `tag_ids` values can be found with hit endpoint [GET TRANSACTION TAGS](https://api-jurnal.api-docs.io/v1/transaction-tag/get-a-list-of-transaction-tags)
- `person_id` value can be found with hit endpoint [GET CONTACTS](https://api-jurnal.api-docs.io/v1/contacts/get-contacts)
- `status_id` values are : 

| Transaction Status | values |
|--------------------|--------|
| Open               | 1      |
| Closed             | 2      |
| Paid               | 3      |
| Partial            | 4      |
| Overdue            | 5      |
| All                | all    |




### FAQ
Q : when I inspect the request with devtools, I found that Jurnal are using extra params like `deposit_account_id` and `z`. What are the actual use of these params ?


A : you can send params without these extra parameter, because we already handle `deposit_account_id` as always will return "all" when it is not specified (and we will not support you if you find problem when you use this params). Params `z` is used as a checksum for our front-end issues, so you can actually ignore these 2 params.
